Simple Chicken Curry

Ingredients

Chicken Marinade
500 g chicken
2 tbsp yogurt
1 tsp salt

Masala
2 onions sliced
2 tbsp oil

Method

Marinating the Chicken
Mix yogurt and salt with chicken in a bowl.
Rest covered for at least 1 hour.

Cooking the Masala
Heat oil in a pan and saute onions until golden.
Add chicken and cook until done.

Tips
Serve hot with rice.
